name: dock-demo
visual_summary: DockAnimation is a React component that displays a dock with customizable cards, gradients, and icons. It responds to mobile viewports by adapting the number and size of cards and gradients. This component is suitable for developers who want to create interactive and mobile-friendly dock experiences.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready ui-component component with the following characteristics:

Name: dock-demo
Description: DockAnimation is a React component that displays a dock with customizable cards, gradients, and icons. It responds to mobile viewports by adapting the number and size of cards and gradients. This component is suitable for developers who want to create interactive and mobile-friendly dock experiences.
Style: material, ui-components
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: dock, card, animation, responsive

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
